title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manya Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manya Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manya Group family as a Instructional Designer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manya Group:
Manya Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group!
